content: A 2025 SOTA curiosity-driven autonomous agent can be built by integrating intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) into a graded active memory architecture, where unanticipated surprising observations are prioritized for long-term retention over familiar, low-curiosity data points. This design lets the agent autonomously curate its own active learning dataset without external labeling, aligning memory retention directly with the agent's intrinsic learning goals.
